2025-10-12T18:07:46.8626879Z hint: is subject to change. To configure the initial branch name to use in all

2025-10-12T18:07:46.8636524Z hint: 	git config --global init.defaultBranch <name>

2025-10-12T18:07:46.8649192Z hint:
2025-10-12T18:07:46.8650409Z hint: 	git branch -m <name>
